parameters.name: Pressure Transfer Idle
parameters.comment: When the line pressure reaches/exceeds the value specified with this parameter while the device is running at load, the device switches to idle operation.

parameters.name: Pressure Transfer On-Load
parameters.comment: In automatic operation mode, if the line pressure reaches or drops below the value specified with this parameter while the compressor is in stop or idle mode, the device will start to run and switch to load.

parameters.name: Line Pressure Alarm
parameters.comment: When the supply pressure reaches the value specified here, the device switches to fault mode at the end of the time entered to the P033 Line Pressure Alarm Delay parameter. The protection function can be cancelled by setting the related parameter to 0.

parameters.name: Line Pressure Warning
parameters.comment: When the supply pressure exceeds the value specified here, at the end of the time entered to the P033 Line Pressure Alarm Delay  parameter, the device displays the relevant warning on the screen.

parameters.name: Screw Pressure On/Off
parameters.comment: Used to activate the use of screw pressure sensor.

parameters.name: Screw Pressure Start Value
parameters.comment: If the measured screw pressure is equal to or higher than the value entered to this parameter, when the run command is received when the device is in stop mode, the compressor is not started and the system waits for the pressure value to decrease. When the screw pressure drops below this value, the running process continues.

parameters.name: Screw Pressure Alarm
parameters.comment: When the screw pressure reaches the value specified here, the device switches to fault mode at the end of the time entered to the P034 Screw Pressure Alarm Delay parameter. The protection function can be cancelled by setting the related parameter to 0.

parameters.name: Screw Pressure Warning
parameters.comment: When the supply pressure exceeds the value specified here, at the end of the time entered to the P.034 Screw Pressure Alarm Delay  parameter, the device displays the relevant warning on the screen.

parameters.name: Pressure Unit
parameters.comment: Determines the pressure unit that the device measures in, displays on the screen and checks. Can be selected as BAR or PSI.

parameters.name: Delta Pressure Alarm
parameters.comment: If the difference between the screw pressure and the line pressure is above this value, the device switches to fault mode with the message  DeltaPress Alarm at the end of the P035 Delta Pressure Alarm Delay period.

parameters.name: Delta Pressure Warning
parameters.comment: If the difference between the screw pressure and the line pressure is above this value, the message  DeltaPress Warn is displayed on the screen.

parameters.name: Difference Pressure Limit
parameters.comment: When the screw pressure value reaches the value entered to this parameter, the pressure difference and warning functions are activated. Relevant controls are not made at pressure values below the value entered to these parameters.

parameters.name: Standard Pressure Load
parameters.comment: Used to quickly load standard pressure values.

parameters.name: Start Delay
parameters.comment: When the device receives a run command, it waits for the time entered to this parameter. The time remaining is displayed on the right side of the screen.

parameters.name: Stopping Time
parameters.comment: When the device receives a stop command, it waits for the time entered to this parameter. The time remaining is displayed on the right side of the screen.

parameters.name: Air Discharge Time
parameters.comment: The expected time for the air pressure of the screw to drop after the compressor stops. During this time, the compressor cannot be started.

parameters.name: Idle Working Time
parameters.comment: Specifies the idle run time before switching to the load when the device receives a run command.

parameters.name: Pass Again Onload Time
parameters.comment: During the idle run process that starts after the compressor running on load switches to idle, when the supply pressure drops below the value entered to the P003 Onload Pressure parameter, the time specified with this parameter is counted and then the device switches back to load.

parameters.name: Auto Waiting Delay
parameters.comment: The time to wait for the compressor to stop after reaching the switch to idle pressure is set with this parameter. During this time, the compressor runs in idle mode.

parameters.name: Power Cut Restart Delay
parameters.comment: In case of power faults that occur while the compressor is running, after the power is on again, the device switches to run mode at the end of the time set with this parameter. By entering 0 value to the relevant parameter, the automatic run function at power fault is cancelled.

parameters.name: Star Duration Time
parameters.comment: In the motor starting stage, running duration of star contactor of motor is adjusted with this parameter.

parameters.name: Main Contactor Delay
parameters.comment: After the star contactor is triggered, the main output is activated at the end of the time value entered to this parameter.

parameters.name: Triangle Transfer Time
parameters.comment: After the star contactor is deactivated, the delta contactor output is activated at the end of the time value entered to this parameter.

parameters.name: Preheat Onload Time
parameters.comment: Indicates the time to stay on load in the preheat running mode.

parameters.name: Preheat Idle Time
parameters.comment: Indicates the time to stay IDLE in the preheat running mode.

parameters.name: Line Pressure Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: The expected delay time for line pressure alarm error.

parameters.name: Screw Pressure Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: The expected delay time for screw pressure alarm error.

parameters.name: Delta Pressure Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: The expected delay time for pressure difference alarm error.

parameters.name: Fan Maksimum Working Time
parameters.comment: If the compressor stops while the fan running condition continues, the fan continues to run within this period. At the end of the period, the fan is stopped regardless of the temperature conditions.

parameters.name: Dryer Duration
parameters.comment: The duration of the dryer function.

parameters.name: Sufficiency Delay
parameters.comment: The delay time for the qualification pressure error set with the P013 Sufficiency Pressure parameter.

parameters.name: Horn Duration
parameters.comment: Indicates the blowing time of the horn when an alarm occurs. At the end of this period, the horn is silenced.

parameters.name: Booster Delay
parameters.comment: This parameter, which is used in the Booster Operation application, is the parameter that determines how long the compressor will go into error during operation according to the activity of the Low Pressure input function and The operating status of the compressor.

parameters.name: General Maintenance
parameters.comment: The general service time is set with this parameter.

parameters.name: Roller Maintenance
parameters.comment: The bearing maintenance time is set with this parameter.

parameters.name: Oil Change Maintenance
parameters.comment: The oil change time is set with this parameter.

parameters.name: Air Filter Maintenance
parameters.comment: The Service Air Filter Replacement time is set with this parameter.

parameters.name: Oil Filter Maintenance
parameters.comment: The oil filter replacement time is set with this parameter.

parameters.name: Seperator Filter Maintenance
parameters.comment: The separator filter change time is set with this parameter.

parameters.name: Service Alarm Activation
parameters.comment: This parameter is set to 1 so that the compressor stops when the maintenance time.

parameters.name: Maintenance Reset
parameters.comment: This parameter is used to reset the service time. The service time desired to be reset is selected with this parameter.

parameters.name: Out Pressure Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the output pressure analog sensor. Its default value is 0.000. Any value to be entered in this parameter is added to the value Of the output pressure analog sensor.

parameters.name: Out Pressure Gain
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the output pressure analog sensor. Its default value is 1.000.  Any value entered in this parameter is multiplied by the value of the output pressure analog sensor.

parameters.name: Internal Pressure Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the internal pressure analog sensor. Its default value is 0.000.  Any value to be entered in this parameter is added to the value of the internal pressure analog sensor.

parameters.name: Internal Pressure Gain
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the internal pressure analog sensor. Its default value is 1.000.  Any value entered in this parameter is multiplied by the value of the internal pressure analog sensor.

parameters.name: Temperature Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the temperature analog sensor. Its default value is 0.000.  Any value entered in this parameter is added to the value of the temperature analog sensor.

parameters.name: Temperature Gain
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the temperature analog sensor. Its default value is 1.000.  Any value entered in this parameter is multiplied by the value of the temperature analog sensor.

parameters.name: Vr Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the R phase voltage measurement analog sensor. Its default value is 0.000. Any value entered in this parameter is added to the value of the voltage measurement analog sensor.

parameters.name: Vr Gain
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the R phase voltage measurement analog sensor. Its default value is 1.000. Any value entered in this parameter is multiplied by the value of the voltage measurement analog sensor.

parameters.name: Vs Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the S phase voltage measurement analog sensor. Its default value is 0.000. Any value entered in this parameter is added to the value of the voltage measurement analog sensor.

parameters.name: Vs Gain
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the S phase voltage measurement analog sensor. Its default value is 1.000. Any value entered in this parameter is multiplied by the value of the voltage measurement analog sensor.

parameters.name: Vt Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the T phase voltage measurement analog sensor. Its default value is 0.000. Any value entered in this parameter is added to the value of the voltage measurement analog sensor.

parameters.name: Vt Gain
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the T phase voltage measurement analog sensor. Its default value is 1.000. Any value entered in this parameter is multiplied by the value of the voltage measurement analog sensor.

parameters.name: Motor Current-1 Offset
parameters.comment: his parameter is the calibration parameter of the Motor phase current 1 measurement analog sensor. Its default value is 0.000. Any value entered in this parameter is added to the value of the Motor phase current 1 measurement analog sensor.

parameters.name: Motor Current-1 Gain
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the Motor phase current 1 measurement analog sensor. Its default value is 1.000. Any value entered in this parameter is multiplied by the value of the Motor phase current 1 measurement analog sensor.

parameters.name: Motor Current-2 Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the Motor phase current 2 measurement analog sensor. Its default value is 0.000. Any value entered in this parameter is added to the value of the Motor phase current 2 measurement analog sensor.

parameters.name: Motor Current-2 Gain
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the Motor phase current 2 measurement analog sensor. Its default value is 1.000. Any value entered in this parameter is multiplied by the value of the Motor phase current 2 measurement analog sensor.

parameters.name: Motor Current-3 Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the Motor phase current 2 measurement analog sensor. Its default value is 0.000. Any value entered in this parameter is added to the value of the Motor phase current 2 measurement analog sensor.

parameters.name: Motor Current-3 Gain
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the Motor phase current 2 measurement analog sensor. Its default value is 1.000. Any value entered in this parameter is multiplied by the value of the Motor phase current 2 measurement analog sensor.

parameters.name: Blower Current Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the Blower motor current measurement analog sensor. Its default value is 0.000. Any value entered in this parameter will be added to the value of the Blower motor current measurement analog sensor.

parameters.name: Blower Current Gain
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the Blower motor current measurement analog sensor. Its default value is 1.000. Any value entered in this parameter will be multiplied by the value of the Blower motor current measurement analog sensor.

parameters.name: Temperature 1 High Alarm
parameters.comment: When the temperature measured by the screw temperature sender exceeds the value entered in this parameter, the device malfunctions and stops the compressor.

parameters.name: Temperature 1 High Warning
parameters.comment: When the temperature measured by the screw temperature sender exceeds the value entered in this parameter, the device gives a warning.

parameters.name: Temperature 1 Low Alarm
parameters.comment: When the temperature measured by the screw temperature sender falls below the value entered in this parameter, the device malfunctions and stops the compressor.

parameters.name: Temperature 1 Low Warn
parameters.comment: When the temperature measured by the screw temperature sender falls below the value entered in this parameter, the device gives a warning.

parameters.name: Preheat Limit
parameters.comment: If the temperature measured by the screw temperature sender at start-up is below the value entered in this parameter, the device operates in preheating mode until the temperature rises above this value.

parameters.name: Temperature 1 SensorType
parameters.comment: The type of screw temperature sender is determined by this parameter.

parameters.name: Temperature Unit
parameters.comment: The temperature unit used in the display and control phases of the device is set with this parameter.

parameters.name: Fan Start
parameters.comment: If the function of one of the outputs of the device is set as Fan, if the value measured by the screw temperature sender is above the value entered with this parameter, the relevant Fan output is activated until it reaches the stop temperature.

parameters.name: Fan Stop
parameters.comment: If the function of one of the outputs of the device is set as Fan, if the value measured by the screw temperature sender is below the value entered with this parameter, the relevant Fan output is disabled until it reaches the operating temperature.

parameters.name: Dryer Start Temperature
parameters.comment: There are 2 different dryer functions in the digital output functions, Dryer-Z and Dryer-S. When the Dryer-S function is selected, the dryer signal output is generated according to this parameter.

parameters.name: Dryer Stop Temperature
parameters.comment: There are 2 different dryer functions in the digital output functions, Dryer-Z and Dryer-S. When the Dryer-S function is selected, the dryer signal output is generated according to this parameter.

parameters.name: Temperature 2 High Alarm
parameters.comment: When the temperature measured by the second temperature sender exceeds the value entered in this parameter, the device malfunctions and stops the compressor.

parameters.name: Temperature 2 High Warn
parameters.comment: When the temperature measured by the second temperature sender exceeds the value entered in this parameter, the device gives a warning.

parameters.name: Temperature 2 Low Alarm
parameters.comment: When the temperature measured by the second temperature sender falls below the value entered in this parameter, the device malfunctions and stops the compressor.

parameters.name: Temperature 2 Low Warn
parameters.comment: When the temperature measured by the second temperature sender falls below the value entered in this parameter, the device gives a warning.

parameters.name: Temperature 2 Sensor Type
parameters.comment: The type of the second temperature sender is determined by this parameter.

parameters.name: Temperature 2 Sensor Mode
parameters.comment: The mode of operation of the second temperature sender is determined by this parameter.

parameters.name: Press.Comp.Temp.
parameters.comment: If the value measured by the screw temperature sender is lower than the value specified by this parameter, the compressor switches to idle according to the following new idle pressure instead of P002 idle pressure. Idle Pressure = P003 + (P002 - P003)/4

parameters.name: Oil Freeze Prevent
parameters.comment: This function can be used to prevent the screw oil from freezing in cold weather. If the compressor will not operate in a cold environment for a long time (for example for 2 days on a weekend), it may be desired to heat the screw oil at certain intervals. In this case, when the value measured with the 1st temperature sensor reaches the value measured with this parameter, the compressor is started for a short time. If you do not want to use this feature, you can set the value of this parameter to -99.9°C.

parameters.name: Number of Devices that Can Run Simultaneously
parameters.comment: Number of Devices that Can Work Simultaneously

parameters.name: Parallel Control Total Run Time MSB
Parallel Control Total Run Time LSB
NTC-1 Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the temperature analog sensor. Its default value is 0.000.  Any value entered in this parameter is added to the value of the temperature analog sensor.

parameters.name: NTC-2 Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the temperature analog sensor. Its default value is 1.000.  Any value entered in this parameter is multiplied by the value of the temperature analog sensor.

parameters.name: KTY81-1 Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the temperature analog sensor. Its default value is 0.000.  Any value entered in this parameter is added to the value of the temperature analog sensor.

parameters.name: KTY81-2 Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the temperature analog sensor. Its default value is 1.000.  Any value entered in this parameter is multiplied by the value of the temperature analog sensor.

parameters.name: PT1000-1 Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the temperature analog sensor. Its default value is 0.000.  Any value entered in this parameter is added to the value of the temperature analog sensor.

parameters.name: PT1000-2 Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the temperature analog sensor. Its default value is 1.000.  Any value entered in this parameter is multiplied by the value of the temperature analog sensor.

parameters.name: KTY135-1 Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the temperature analog sensor. Its default value is 0.000.  Any value entered in this parameter is added to the value of the temperature analog sensor.

parameters.name: KTY135-2 Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the temperature analog sensor. Its default value is 1.000.  Any value entered in this parameter is multiplied by the value of the temperature analog sensor.

parameters.name: PT100-1 Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the temperature analog sensor. Its default value is 0.000.  Any value entered in this parameter is added to the value of the temperature analog sensor.

parameters.name: PT100-2 Offset
parameters.comment: This parameter is the calibration parameter of the temperature analog sensor. Its default value is 1.000.  Any value entered in this parameter is multiplied by the value of the temperature analog sensor.
